creator: ted@wiz.plymouth.edu
text:
In KDE2 (from packages), Sound utilities fail to work but System
sounds do.  The problem is that "artsd" is not starting due to
an error.

artsd
Error while initializing the sound driver:
SNDCTL_DSP_SETFMT failed - Invalid argument

Fix: 

None known.
How-To-Repeat: Start KDE2 again or run "artsd" from a terminal session.
